revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-060

A system operating on the assigned frequency of 100 kHz and having a groundwave range of nominally 1500 miles over sea water or land.

Very high accuracy is obtained by comparing the phase of the cycles comprising the pulses of the paired stations.

The occupied bandwidth is 20 kHz.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Loran C}}
